---
title: "Xingchen Liu"
image: images/Xingchen Liu.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:xingcliu@polyu.edu.hk
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=dvj0bhwAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6576-2434
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I am currently serving as a Research Assistant Professor in the [Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University](https://www.polyu.edu.hk/ise/people/academic-staff/xingchen-liu/). My research interests include condition monitoring, fault diagnosis, prognostics and health management, and machine learning.

## Openings
<span style="color: red;">I am seeking a highly motivated PhD student to join my research group. A full scholarship will be available for the successful candidate, and I anticipate the position to start in January 2027. </span>
Candidates with strong programming, engineering, and/or mathematical skills, as well as a proactive attitude, are especially encouraged to get in touch.
If you're interested, please feel free to email me your CV, transcript(s), and a brief description of your research interests. I will give each inquiry my full attention, but I ask for your patience in advance, as I may only be able to respond to candidates who are a close match for the position.

## Research Interests
- Condition monitoring and fault diagnosis: using statistical machine learning or signal processing methods to monitor the health status of complex systems and diagnose faults.
- Prognostics and health management: degradation modeling, remaining useful life prediction, and maintenance decision-making for complex systems.
- Machine learning and data analytics: developing novel machine learning algorithms and applying them to real-world engineering problems.

## Work Experience

- 2025.01–present: The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering, **Research Assistant Professor**
- 2023.07–2024.12: Hong Kong Science Park, Centre for Advances in Reliability and Safety, **Postdoctoral Fellow**, mentor: Prof. [C.K.M. LEE](https://www.polyu.edu.hk/ise/people/academic-staff/carman-km-lee/)
- 2022.01–2023.04: City University of Hong Kong, Department of Advanced Design and Systems Engineering, **Postdoc.**, mentor: Prof. [Min XIE](https://scholars.cityu.edu.hk/en/persons/minxie/)

## Education

- 2017.08–2021.08: National University of Singapore, Department of Industrial Systems Engineering and Management, **Ph.D.**, supervisor: Prof. [Zhi-Sheng YE](https://cde.nus.edu.sg/isem/staff/ye-zhisheng/)
- 2014.09–2017.06: University of Science and Technology of China, Instrument Science and Technology, **M.Sc.**, supervoisor: Prof. [Qingbo HE](https://me.sjtu.edu.cn/en/FullTimeTeacher/heqingbo.html)
- 2010.09–2014.06: Hunan University, Measurement and Control Technology and Instrumentation, **B.Eng.**

## Contact
- Email: xingcliu@polyu.edu.hk (Primary); xingchenliu@u.nus.edu 
- Phone: (852) 2766 6580
- Office: E Building, 6-th Floor, Room EF612
- Address: The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, Hong Kong



<div style="text-align: center;">
  <a href='https://mapmyvisitors.com/web/1c6le'  title='Visit tracker'><img src='https://mapmyvisitors.com/map.png?cl=ffffff&w=300&t=tt&d=wcQPxsc3J-9mD9EzFEq04IqQMDfGLUjo88E9hFArejs&co=2d78ad&ct=ffffff'/></a>
</div>

<p>Last update time：<span id="last-modified"></span></p>

<script>
    // 获取文档最后修改时间
    var x = new Date(document.lastModified);
    
    // 格式化输出为 YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM
    var year = x.getFullYear();
    var month = ('0' + (x.getMonth() + 1)).slice(-2);
    var day = ('0' + x.getDate()).slice(-2);
    var hours = ('0' + x.getHours()).slice(-2);
    var minutes = ('0' + x.getMinutes()).slice(-2);
    
    // 将时间填入 span 元素中
    document.getElementById('last-modified').textContent = year + '-' + month;
</script>
:::
